heading: Limitations on amount of operating loans
label: 1943 Limitations on amount of operating loans

children.text: that would cause the total principal indebtedness outstanding at any one time for loans made under this subchapter to any one borrower to exceed, in the case of a loan other than a loan guaranteed by the Secretary, $400,000, or, in the case of a loan guaranteed by the Secretary, $1,750,000 (increased, beginning with fiscal year 2019, by the inflation percentage applicable to the fiscal year in which the loan is guaranteed and reduced by the unpaid indebtedness of the borrower on loans under the sections specified in that are guaranteed by the Secretary); orsection 1925 of this title
for the purchasing or leasing of land other than for cash rent, or for carrying on any land leasing or land purchasing program.

the average of the Prices Paid By Farmers Index (as compiled by the National Agricultural Statistics Service of the Department of Agriculture) for the 12-month period ending on July 31 of the immediately preceding fiscal year; exceeds
the average of such index (as so defined) for the 12-month period that immediately precedes the 12-month period described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the Secretary may establish a program to make or guarantee microloans.

children.heading: Limitations
children.label: 2 Limitations
children.text: The Secretary shall not make or guarantee a microloan under this subsection that would cause the total principal indebtedness outstanding at any 1 time for microloans made under this subsection to any 1 borrower to exceed $50,000.

children.heading: Applications
children.label: 3 Applications
children.text: To the maximum extent practicable, the Secretary shall limit the administrative burdens and streamline the application and approval process for microloans under this subsection.

children.label: i
children.text: to make or guarantee microloans consistent with the terms provided under this subsection; and

children.label: ii
children.text: to provide business, financial, marketing, and credit management services to microloan borrowers.

children.label: I
children.text: the loan loss reserve fund for microloans established by the institution; and

children.label: II
children.text: the underwriting standards for microloans of the institution; and

children.label: ii
children.text: establish such other requirements for making a loan to the institution as the Secretary determines necessary.

children.label: i
children.text: have the legal authority necessary to carry out the actions described in subparagraph (A);

children.label: ii
children.text: have a proven track record of successfully assisting agricultural borrowers; and

children.label: iii
children.text: have the services of a staff with appropriate loan making and servicing expertise.

children.heading: Oversight
children.label: D Oversight
children.text: Not less often than annually, on a date determined by the Secretary, an institution that has a loan under this paragraph shall provide to the Secretary such information as the Secretary may require to ensure that the services provided by the institution are serving the purposes of this subsection.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: E Limitation
children.text: The Secretary shall not make more than $10,000,000 in loans under this paragraph in any fiscal year.
